episodes.title: Sentencing delayed for Oroville cult leader convicted of sexual assault
episodes.description: SANSUE BEE VANG — THE RELIGIOUS LEADER AND FOUNDER OF AN OROVILLE CULT — WAS BACK IN COURT TODAY BUT HIS SENTENCING WAS ULTIMATELY DELAYED. ACTION NEWS NOW REPORTER EMILIO DEL CARPIO ATTENDED THE HEARING AND BRINGS US THE DETAILS
subjects: Kev Ntseeg Leej Niam Kee Tiam Vaj Lis Thum

episodes.title: Sentencing delayed for Oroville cult leader convicted of sexual assault
episodes.description: Sentencing for Sansue Bee Vang, convicted of multiple counts of child molestation and rape, was postponed after the defense requested more time to submit information; Vang remains in custody without bail and faces a likely life sentence.
subjects: Kev Ntseeg Leej Niam Kee Tiam Vaj Lis Thum

episodes.title: Oroville religious leader convicted of rape, child molestation faces sentencing today
episodes.description: According to the Butte County District Attorney, the investigation started in 2024 when an 11-year-old girl and her mother reported being sexually assaulted by Vang. 4 more women later came forward to testify. The Butte County DA says the 6 named victims were part of his Hmong religious group that started in Wisconsin and moved to Oroville in 2020. Vang's sentencing hearing is scheduled for 1:30 p.m.
subjects: Kev Ntseeg Leej Niam Kee Tiam Vaj Lis Thum

episodes.title: Oroville cult leader found guilty, sentencing set for April
episodes.description: A Butte County jury has found a local cult leader guilty of molesting four young girls and raping two women, all followers of his religious movement. Sansue Bee Vang now faces life in state prison.
subjects: Kev Ntseeg Leej Niam Kee Tiam Vaj Lis Thum

episodes.title: Oroville Religious Leader Faces New Sexual Assault Charges
episodes.description: Sansue Vang, who was previously accused of two counts of sexual assault, appeared in court Wednesday to set a trial date.
subjects: Kev Ntseeg Leej Niam Kee Tiam Vaj Lis Thum

episodes.title: Oroville religious leader back in court, now facing additional criminal sexual abuse charges
episodes.description: Sansue Vang was arrested a year ago, accused of sexually molesting a child on five occasions and forcibly raping a woman on two occasions. On Thursday, Vang will also be arraigned on additional criminal sexual abuse charges.
subjects: Kev Ntseeg Leej Niam Kee Tiam Vaj Lis Thum
